title: Update VTH logo — larger size, improved color scheme

requirements.summary: Redesign the VTH logo/wordmark in the sticky header to be significantly larger and more visually prominent with increased font size, weight, and letter spacing
acceptanceCriteria: The VTH branding in the header is noticeably larger than before
The logo/wordmark is immediately readable and prominent on both mobile and desktop viewports
No other header elements are obscured by the larger logo

file_operations.description: Increase the size, weight, and letter spacing of the VTH logo/wordmark in the sticky header. Update the font size from text-xl to a larger size (e.g., text-3xl or text-4xl), increase font weight to font-extrabold or font-black, and add letter spacing (tracking-wide or tracking-wider) to make the branding more prominent and immediately readable on all viewport sizes.

requirements.summary: Update the color scheme of the VTH logo/wordmark to use warm earthy OKLCH colors that harmonize with the site's existing design tokens
acceptanceCriteria: The VTH logo uses colors drawn from or harmonious with the site's warm earthy OKLCH color tokens
The logo color scheme looks polished and intentional in both light and dark modes
The logo does not clash visually with the header background or navigation elements

file_operations.description: Update the VTH logo/wordmark color classes to use warm earthy OKLCH colors from the site's design token system defined in frontend/src/index.css. Replace the current text color with classes that reference the existing color tokens (e.g., text-chart-1, text-chart-2, or custom combinations of the warm OKLCH palette) to create a harmonious, polished appearance that works in both light and dark modes without clashing with the header background.
